invoice_types.RCM: Reverse Charge Mechanism — recipient pays tax

gst_slabs.0: Nil rated — basic necessities (milk, fresh veg, books)
gst_slabs.5: Essential goods — sugar, tea, coffee, fertilisers
gst_slabs.12: Standard goods — medicines, processed food, textiles > ₹1000
gst_slabs.18: Standard rate — IT services, electronics, FMCG
gst_slabs.28: Luxury / sin goods — cars, tobacco, aerated drinks
gst_slabs.exempt: Exempt from GST entirely — healthcare, education

eligible: Input services directly related to business
Works contract services for plant and machinery
ineligible_section_17_5: Motor vehicles (unless used for specific purposes)

gstr3b_sections.3.1a: Outward taxable supplies (other than zero-rated, exempt)
gstr3b_sections.3.1d: Inward supplies liable to reverse charge

itc_offset_rules.note: CGST ITC cannot offset SGST and vice versa. IGST ITC can offset all.

mismatch_actions.not_in_2b: defer_invoice — wait for supplier to file

gstin_validation.format: 2-digit state code + 10-char PAN + 1-digit entity + Z + 1 check digit

penalties.late_filing: 18% per annum interest on unpaid tax
